text.title: Accessibility Testing Process Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Accessibility Testing Process end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: scope-and-target
step.action: List flows to audit; pin WCAG version+level; book AT rigs + user panel.

step.name: automated-layer
step.action: Run axe + pa11y + lighthouse across all flows; collect findings.

step.name: manual-keyboard-layer
step.action: Tab through each flow; record focus traps, invisible focus, order issues; attach video.

step.name: at-layer
step.action: Run each flow through 2+ SRs (desktop + mobile); log AT-specific findings.
step.decision-gate: If only one SR available, STOP and reschedule.

step.name: user-panel-and-aggregate
step.action: Run 3+ disabled-user sessions; aggregate findings; assign severity; tag user_panel.
step.decision-gate: If user panel skipped, attach waiver with reason.
